creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jov from comment #3)
Jov, are you still here after a year?

XPLIST_FILES=	${PREFIX}/sbin/${PORTNAME}

PLIST_FILES=	sbin/boot_root_nfs

XCOMMENT=	Quick and dirty utilty to obtain the necessary parameters to boot a Bhyve instance disklessly

Way too long.  Needs to be < 71 chars.
